song.title: Holy Ghost With Light Divine
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Holy Ghost, with light divine, Shine upon this heart of mine; Chase the shade of night away; Turn my darkness into day.
[V2] 2) Let me see my Savior's face, Let me all His beauties trace; Show those glorious truths to me Which are only known to Thee.
[V3] 3) Holy Ghost, with pow’r divine, Cleanse this guilty heart of mine; Long has sin, without control, Held dominion o’er my soul.
[V4] 4) Holy Ghost, with joy divine, Cheer this saddened heart of mine; Bid my many woes depart, Heal my wounded, bleeding heart.
[V5] 5) Holy Spirit, all divine, Dwell within this heart of mine; Cast down every idol throne, Reign supreme, and reign alone.
[V6] 6) See, to Thee I yield my heart, Shed Thy life through every part; A pure temple I would be, Wholly dedicate to Thee
song.author: Rowland Hill
